dedicatedEndpointDesc: POST any JSON payload directly - it will be automatically wrapped as a Webhook event:
description: POST data/files to this project from external systems. In the base version the endpoint is open, adding header authentication is recommended.
fileStorageDesc: Uploaded files are saved to the project's webhook/ directory, overwriting any existing files with the same name:
generalEndpointDesc: POST a structured event with explicit group and name:
matchFilesAlert: Match files using payload.fileCount:2 or check for specific files in your prompt
multipartFormDataDesc: Upload files along with JSON metadata using multipart/form-data:
promptContextDesc: When a Webhook event triggers a rule, the full JSON payload is prepended to your action prompt:
resultingPayloadDesc: The event payload combines your JSON description with file metadata:
